title: Revert site branding to the originally uploaded logo asset

requirements.text: Replace the currently used logo asset with the originally uploaded logo (the one provided earlier by the user) across the entire frontend by updating the centralized branding configuration and ensuring all logo renderings resolve to that original asset.

quotes: Please apply the original logo which i uploaded earlier

acceptanceCriteria: The logo shown in the Header (BrandLogo variant="logo-with-text") matches the originally uploaded logo asset.
The logo shown in the Footer (BrandLogo variant="logo-with-text") matches the originally uploaded logo asset.
The logo shown on the Home page hero (BrandLogo variant="logo-with-text") matches the originally uploaded logo asset.
The app uses a single source of truth for the logo path (via frontend/src/config/branding.ts), with no remaining references that cause a different/incorrect logo to appear.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/components/ui (read-only).
Do not edit immutable hook files (frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts) or frontend/src/main.tsx.
nonGoals: Redesigning or generating a new logo.
Changing the wordmark, favicon, or Open Graph image unless they are also part of the user’s originally uploaded logo set and explicitly needed to match what was uploaded.
